DescribeMetricDataLatestTop.action: API action name, fixed value: DescribeMetricDataLatestTop
DescribeMetricDataLatestTop.metricName: Metric name, only single-metric Top queries are supported
DescribeMetricDataLatestTop.filters.values: Multiple values, applicable to operator: in
DescribeMetricDataLatestTop.limit: Maximum number of curves to return when multiple match; default: 10, max: 100
DescribeMetricDataLatestTop.aggregationOverTime: Time-axis aggregation method; default: avg, options: avg / sum / max / min
